rounds: Lavendra was his — necklace, black bag, Noskin loafers, people who actually know him, no armour. That's a clean win. Pink toes held all week and the thong at Balmoral was a deliberate choice, not an accident. But the poncho came out again, and the wetsuit moment? Caught himself hiding his toes from the swim group — Joy Police showed up exactly where they always do: his people, not strangers.
pattern: They're quiet around anyone who doesn't matter and loud the second someone who knows him might actually see.
focus: Look at one daily routine this week and ask — is this what I'd choose, or just what I do?
